title: rubus arcticus subsp. stellatus
intro: Rubus arcticus subsp. stellatus, also known as the Stellate Raspberry, is a subspecies of the Arctic Raspberry plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its rich content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus arcticus subsp. stellatus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical applications to harness its medicinal benefits.
